# Fleet repos the coverage-audit scans for reference-library gaps.
# One `owner/repo` per line. Lines starting with `#` and blank lines are ignored.
# The plugin marketplace repo itself is intentionally excluded — it IS the library.
#
# The coverage-audit workflow reads this file weekly, inventories each repo's
# significant direct dependencies, diffs them against
# plugins/dev-lifecycle/references/, and opens a PR adding a grounded
# reference for any missing framework/library. Edit this list as the fleet
# changes — add a repo here and its stack is covered on the next run.
#
# Private repos require the FLEET_READ_TOKEN secret (see the workflow header).
#
# Replace the commented examples below with your own fleet's `owner/repo`
# entries:
# <owner>/<repo-one>
# <owner>/<repo-two>
